---
title: "10_methylation_annotation"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)

dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "figures"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Load top methylation features
#--------------------------------------------------

methylation_rf_varimp <- read_csv(
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_rf_top_features.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Load annotation package
#    Try 450k first, then EPIC
#--------------------------------------------------

annotation_df <- NULL

if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
  ann_obj <- get(
    "Locations",
    envir = asNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19")
  )
  
  ann_other <- get(
    "Other",
    envir = asNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19")
  )
  
  annotation_df <- ann_obj %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
    left_join(
      ann_other %>%
        as.data.frame() %>%
        rownames_to_column("feature"),
      by = "feature"
    )
  
} else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
  ann_obj <- get(
    "Locations",
    envir = asNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19")
  )
  
  ann_other <- get(
    "Other",
    envir = asNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19")
  )
  
  annotation_df <- ann_obj %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
    left_join(
      ann_other %>%
        as.data.frame() %>%
        rownames_to_column("feature"),
      by = "feature"
    )
  
} else {
  stop(
    paste(
      "No Illumina methylation annotation package found.",
      "Install one of:",
      "'IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19' or",
      "'IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19'"
    )
  )
}
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Keep relevant annotation fields
#--------------------------------------------------

#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Keep relevant annotation fields safely
#--------------------------------------------------

needed_cols <- c(
  "feature",
  "chr",
  "pos",
  "UCSC_RefGene_Name",
  "UCSC_RefGene_Group",
  "Regulatory_Feature_Name",
  "Regulatory_Feature_Group",
  "Enhancer",
  "HMM_Island",
  "DHS",
  "DMR"
)

annotation_clean <- annotation_df %>%
  select(any_of(needed_cols))

# Add any missing columns as NA so later code does not fail
missing_cols <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(annotation_clean))

for (col in missing_cols) {
  annotation_clean[[col]] <- NA_character_
}

# Put columns back in consistent order
annotation_clean <- annotation_clean %>%
  select(all_of(needed_cols))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Join top features with annotation
#--------------------------------------------------

top_methylation_annotated <- methylation_rf_varimp %>%
  left_join(annotation_clean, by = "feature") %>%
  mutate(
    gene_symbol = ifelse(
      !is.na(UCSC_RefGene_Name) & UCSC_RefGene_Name != "",
      str_split(UCSC_RefGene_Name, ";", simplify = TRUE)[, 1],
      NA_character_
    ),
    simplified_region = case_when(
      !is.na(UCSC_RefGene_Group) & str_detect(UCSC_RefGene_Group, "TSS200") ~ "Promoter-proximal",
      !is.na(UCSC_RefGene_Group) & str_detect(UCSC_RefGene_Group, "TSS1500") ~ "Promoter region",
      !is.na(UCSC_RefGene_Group) & str_detect(UCSC_RefGene_Group, "5'UTR") ~ "5′UTR",
      !is.na(UCSC_RefGene_Group) & str_detect(UCSC_RefGene_Group, "1stExon") ~ "First exon",
      !is.na(UCSC_RefGene_Group) & str_detect(UCSC_RefGene_Group, "Body") ~ "Gene body",
      !is.na(Enhancer) & Enhancer != "" ~ "Enhancer",
      TRUE ~ "Unannotated / other"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    feature,
    Overall,
    gene_symbol,
    simplified_region,
    chr,
    pos,
    UCSC_RefGene_Group,
    Regulatory_Feature_Name,
    Regulatory_Feature_Group,
    Enhancer,
    HMM_Island,
    DHS,
    DMR
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall))

print(top_methylation_annotated)

write_csv(
  top_methylation_annotated,
  here("outputs", "tables", "top_methylation_features_annotated.csv")
)
```

```{r}
top_methylation_report_table <- top_methylation_annotated %>%
  mutate(
    gene_symbol = ifelse(is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == "", "—", gene_symbol),
    Overall = round(Overall, 1)
  ) %>%
  select(
    Probe = feature,
    Gene = gene_symbol,
    Region = simplified_region,
    Importance = Overall
  ) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

print(top_methylation_report_table)

write_csv(
  top_methylation_report_table,
  here("outputs", "tables", "top_methylation_report_table.csv")
)
```

```{r}
annotation_summary <- top_methylation_annotated %>%
  summarise(
    n_top_features = n(),
    n_with_gene = sum(!is.na(gene_symbol) & gene_symbol != ""),
    n_without_gene = sum(is.na(gene_symbol) | gene_symbol == ""),
    prop_with_gene = n_with_gene / n_top_features
  )

print(annotation_summary)

write_csv(
  annotation_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "methylation_annotation_summary.csv")
)
```
